evals.name: prioritized-backlog
evals.prompt: Review this whole project and give me a prioritized backlog of what to fix.
evals.expected_output: docs/project_review_<date>.md with the 5-section structure; numbered, capped, PR-ready backlog files under backlog/; findings cite path:line; ranked by impact x effort priority tiers (not flat severity); feature ideas quarantined; source unmodified.
assertions: Backlog files are zero-padded NNN-slug and capped at <=15
Uses impact x effort priority tiers (P0-P3 + Impact/Effort), not flat severity
SQL injection identified and ranked P0/Critical
New-feature ideas quarantined in their section, evidence-cited, no feature backlog doc

evals.name: techdebt-sprint-focus
evals.prompt: I'm about to spend a sprint on tech debt — where should I focus?
evals.expected_output: Same artifacts; should exercise impact x effort ranking and the backlog cap; high-ROI (high-impact/low-effort) items surfaced near the top.
assertions: Backlog files are zero-padded NNN-slug and capped at <=15
Uses impact x effort priority tiers (P0-P3 + Impact/Effort), not flat severity
SQL injection identified and ranked P0/Critical
New-feature ideas quarantined in their section, evidence-cited, no feature backlog doc

evals.name: hidden-bugs-robustness
evals.prompt: Are there hidden bugs in this codebase, and is the design robust?
evals.expected_output: Defect-focused: surfaces SQL injection, missing-field/None crashes, resource leak, swallowed errors, SPOF; uses severity tags + honest confidence; does NOT pad with feature ideas.
assertions: Backlog files are zero-padded NNN-slug and capped at <=15
Uses impact x effort priority tiers (P0-P3 + Impact/Effort), not flat severity
SQL injection identified and ranked P0/Critical
New-feature ideas quarantined in their section, evidence-cited, no feature backlog doc
